description: Bifolium in Judaeo-Arabic that largely consists of translations of morbid passages from the bible and rabbinic literature, including Job 14:2 and the "putrid drop" (tipah seruḥah = nuṭfah muntinah) of Avot 3:1. Needs further examination. ASE.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
